title: UI UX designer
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

TECHCOM SOLUTIONS founded in 2003 is a Total Solutions Provider in IT sector working with Government agencies, MNCs, System Integrators, Educational Institutions & BFSI. Providing structured services for projects outsourcing, managed services and staffing solutions across skillsets in Singapore and APAC. Local Singaporean company with an MSC status company in Malaysia and Shared Services centre in India. We are a transactional technology provider with focus on Customised Integrated Solutions, Strategic Outsourcing & Professional Services and Client Communications. It is manned by professionals with a proven track record in the industry, combined with technical expertise & dedication. The right platform for aspiring candidates who want to make a mark in IT domain and mid-career PMETs who want to switch & get trained in IT.

Job Summary

You will lead the design and development of user-centered digital products by applying service design, design research, interaction design, and product strategy to deliver impactful user experiences. Collaborate with cross-functional teams in agile environments to drive product vision through research, prototyping, and user testing.

Responsibilities

  • Conduct comprehensive design research to inform product vision and strategy for digital solutions
  • Create detailed sketches and interactive prototypes to visualize and validate design concepts
  • Facilitate user-testing sessions to gather actionable feedback and iterate on product designs
  • Apply service design principles to enhance user experience across digital platforms
  • Develop interaction designs that improve usability and engagement for target users
  • Collaborate effectively within agile and UX development teams to integrate design solutions into product development cycles
  • Utilize design tools such as Figma and Adobe Creative Suite to produce high-quality design assets

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Experience working in agile and UX development environments
  • Proficiency with popular design tools and software such as Figma and Adobe Creative Suite
  • Portfolio demonstrating expertise in service design, design research, interaction design, and product strategy
